headline: Target Just Posted Its First Sales Growth in 5 Quarters. So Why Did the Stock Drop Anyway?
summary: A strong sales number and a raised full-year outlook still couldn't keep the big-box retailer's shares from sliding after its latest report.

raw.headline: Target Just Posted Its First Sales Growth in 5 Quarters. So Why Did the Stock Drop Anyway?
raw.summary: A strong sales number and a raised full-year outlook still couldn't keep the big-box retailer's shares from sliding after its latest report.

headline: Target has strong message for disappointed customers
summary: Target has spent the past few years battling a reputation problem that has proven difficult to shake. Once known for clean, well-merchandised stores and a “cheap chic” shopping experience, the retailer has more recently faced criticism from shoppers over messy aisles, inconsistent inventory, ...

headline: Retailers look to bridge the K-shaped economy with dual playbooks of price cuts and premiumization
summary: As the K-shaped economy continues to divide Americans, retailers are courting lower-income customers with lower prices while catering to more affluent customers with premium offerings.

raw.headline: Retailers look to bridge the K-shaped economy with dual playbooks of price cuts and premiumization
raw.summary: As the K-shaped economy continues to divide Americans, retailers are courting lower-income customers with lower prices while catering to more affluent customers with premium offerings.
